message:
fix(output): don't strip markup from data output to preserve JSON brackets

The strip_markup() regex `\[/?[^\]]*\]` was corrupting JSON output by
treating array brackets like `[]` and `["value"]` as markup tags.
This caused `"hashtags":[]` to become `"hashtags":,` (invalid JSON).

The print_data() method is specifically for data output (JSON, TOON, CSV)
which should never contain markup tags, so strip_markup is unnecessary.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
